PreCommit.command: bash -c 'if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE "\.py$"; then cd backend && uv run ruff check $(git diff --cached --name-only --relative | grep "\.py$" | tr "\n" " "); fi'
PreCommit.description: Lint staged Python files with Ruff

PreCommit.command: bash -c 'if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$"; then cd frontend && npx biome check $(git diff --cached --name-only --relative | grep -E "\.(ts|tsx)$" | tr "\n" " "); fi'
PreCommit.description: Lint staged TypeScript files with Biome

PreCommit.command: bash -c 'git diff --cached -U0 | grep -iE "(api[_-]?key|secret|password|token|credential)\s*[=:]\s*[\x27\"][^\x27\"]{8,}" && echo "BLOCKED: Possible secret detected in staged changes" && exit 1 || exit 0'

PostToolUse.command: cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>/dev/null || true
PostToolUse.description: Auto-fix Python lint issues after edits

PostToolUse.command: cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>/dev/null || true
PostToolUse.description: Auto-fix Python lint issues after writes

PostToolUse.command: cd frontend && npx biome check --fix $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>/dev/null || true
PostToolUse.description: Auto-fix TypeScript lint issues after edits

PostToolUse.command: cd frontend && npx biome check --fix $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>/dev/null || true
PostToolUse.description: Auto-fix TypeScript lint issues after writes
